message:
feat(replay): regression budgets and CI gate evaluator (ft-og6q6.5.5)

RegressionBudget (TOML config) with max_critical/high/medium, skip_budget,
time_budget. GateEvaluator produces Pass/Fail/Warn with Violation details.
ExpectedDivergenceAnnotation excludes intentional divergences.
32 unit tests + 20 property tests verify all budget invariants.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
